    A

    addIceCream(IceCreamFlavor) - Method in interface entity.IceCreamable
    Set ice cream flavor of IceCreamable ingredient.
    addIceCream(IceCreamFlavor) - Method in class entity.ingredients.Cone
    Set ice cream flavor of IceCreamable ingredient.
    addIceCream(IceCreamFlavor) - Method in class entity.ingredients.SlicedBread
    Set ice cream flavor of IceCreamable ingredient.
    addItem(BaseCounter, ItemSprite) - Method in class gui.room.Room
    Add ItemSprite to counter of this room.
    addItem(ItemSprite) - Method in class logic.counters.BaseCounter
    Adds an item to the counter.
    addMusic(String) - Method in class util.wrapper.BackgroundMusicTrack
    Adds a music file to the track.
    addMusics(String...) - Method in class util.wrapper.BackgroundMusicTrack
    Adds multiple music files to the track.
    addNewThread(Runnable) - Static method in class util.ThreadManager
    Adds a new thread to the thread pool but does not start it.
    allowChangingRoom - Variable in class gui.GameScene
    A flag to indicate whether changing rooms is allowed.
    amount - Variable in class logic.menus.FrenchFries
    The number of fries required for the order.
    AnimatedSprite - Class in sprites
    Represents an animated sprite.
    AnimatedSprite(String, Rectangle2D, int, double, double) - Constructor for class sprites.AnimatedSprite
    Constructs a new AnimatedSprite.
    application - package application
    Contains the main entry point for the game application.
